content.en:
The Lord of Bear Blood did not hide it, and explained: "There are not many Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers who know the Primordial Black Armor, and there are no more than a hundred Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers who know this thing at the end of the realm, and I happen to be one of them. Actually, I know that the original black armor also comes from the inheritance of my master. The primordial black armor came from an even more distant era, when the end of the realm was still under the control of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, and countless cultivators were still slaves of the Extreme Dao creatures, and there was not even a perfect controller of the Extreme Realm. Don't you wonder why the end of the realm, where there are no resources and has been controlled by the Extreme Deep-Sea creatures, suddenly has the strength to resist the Extreme Deep-Sea?"

"This ......"

The Lord of the Ancient also had this doubt, he hadn't thought about it before, but he only thought that it was the end of the realm that gave birth to a genius, which gave rise to the advantage.

The Lord of Bear Blood revealed: "Hahaha, if a Extreme Realm Perfect Controller was born at the end of the original realm, he would definitely be surrounded and killed by the Extreme Realm creatures, and he would not be able to grow at all. The real reason is that an incomparably terrifying creature appeared in the primordial black sea, the other party was dressed in primordial black armor, and was extremely seriously injured, and was besieged by the extreme creatures, and a great war broke out. "

"After that battle, all the extreme creatures who had comprehended the extreme path of the extreme path fell, and not a single one was left. And that mysterious creature entered the end of the realm before dying, and at the end of the realm, a great war broke out with countless extreme path creatures, and thousands of extreme realm perfect controllers and countless true realm perfect controllers extreme path creatures were killed. "

"What, there is such a thing!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

At this time, the Lord of Bear Blood continued: "Since then, the strength of the Extreme Dao creatures has plummeted, but they are still not comparable to cultivators, after all, the Extreme Dao creatures can become super-perfect controllers when they reach adulthood, and there are few super-perfect controllers among the cultivators at that time, how can they resist?"

But I have to say that our cultivators are very lucky, after the fallen mysterious powerhouse was killed, not only the original black armor on his body was shattered, but some of the treasures on his body also escaped to all parts of the world, among which there were some cultivation inheritances, which led to the later cultivators gradually giving birth to the perfect controller of the virtual realm, the perfect controller of the true realm, and even the perfect controller of the extreme realm. Among them, he has become the strongest man in our world, the Lord of the Unbounded.

It is said that the Lord of the Unbounded has obtained an astonishing inheritance, and after that, he has easily comprehended the Extreme Space-Time Pole and can stay in the Primordial Black Sea. Therefore, those extreme creatures could not besiege and kill the Lord of the Boundless at all. With the help of the Unbounded Lord, many of the Extreme Realm Perfect Masters have escaped from life.

After that, as you know, the Lord of the Boundless and the surviving Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers broke out a great battle with the Extreme Path creatures covering the Extreme Path Deep Sea and the End of the Realm, and the war even spread to the Primordial Black Sea, and the Boundless Lord severely damaged the Abyss Palace Lord, killing hundreds of Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers.

After that, the Extreme Path creatures withdrew from the end of the realm, and the end of the realm completely belonged to the cultivators. "

"I see!"

Ye Tian and the Lord of Canggu completely understood.

I have to say that the mysterious powerhouse that suddenly appeared saved the end of the realm, otherwise the extreme path creatures would not have died and suffered heavy injuries, and without the inheritance of the mysterious powerhouse, it would be impossible for the end of the world to give birth to so many perfect controllers of the extreme realm.

"It's not a big secret, there's no point in knowing, Endless Lord, the Primordial Black Armor fragment in your hand contains a lot of extreme defense power, but the Primordial Thunder Stone in my hand is not bad, this thing was also found in the Primordial Black Sea, if you trade with you, you won't lose!" said the Lord of Bear Blood.

"Yes, then just trade like this!"

Ye Tian agreed.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian made a deal with the Lord of Bear Blood.

After that, the Lord of Bear Blood left directly.

"The Primordial Thunder Stone, yes, it will be of great use to me, I can continue to copy the Primordial Thunder Stone, so as to comprehend the Extreme Thunder Dao!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

He has now comprehended the four extreme poles, and he can stay in the primordial black sea for hundreds of years without being excluded, if he comprehends several more extreme poles, even if he does not comprehend the extreme time pole, he can stay in the primordial black sea forever to practice.

"With the Primordial Thunder Stone, there is no need to collect other treasures containing the Extreme Thunder Dao for the time being, and after comprehending the Extreme Thunder Extreme Dao, let's collect it!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

So in the following years, Ye Tian began to comprehend the Extreme Dao of Extreme Thunder, and he was also constantly improving his cultivation, improving his will to the Extreme Dao, and creating more top-notch Extreme Dao control techniques.

As the years passed, Ye Tian's strength was steadily and slowly improving.

The other side.

Ye Tian's Golden-winged Peng Bird Replica Body in the Extreme Deep Sea has also grown, and has grown to the realm of the Perfect Controller of the Void Realm as a peerless genius, and has already attracted the attention of the big people of the Extreme Deep Sea Palace.

And Ye Tian also successfully joined the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace, as one of the forces under the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace, the foundation of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace is also very full, after Ye Tian successfully joined the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace, he can get more resources and secrets.

In addition, Ye Tian also obtained a piece of his own territory, Hurricane Island, which used to be the territory of a True Realm Perfect Controller, but this True Realm Perfect Controller fell, and this territory was reclaimed by the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace.

Now, it belongs to Ye Tian.

On this day, when Ye Tian was practicing on Hurricane Island, a snow-white woman appeared, this woman was naturally not a human being, but an extreme creature-Snow Demon, snow-white, and looked like a human.

There are not many snow demons in the Extreme Deep Sea, but the snow demon in front of him is not an ordinary Extreme Creature.

Ye Tian recognized her at a glance.

"The Ice and Snow Palace Master, one of the thirteen Palace Masters of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace, why is this here!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

Before, this person had also gone to the end of the realm, and he also appeared outside the Extreme Dao True River, but then he followed the Abyss Palace Master back to the Extreme Dao Deep Sea.

According to his understanding, the strength of the Ice and Snow Palace Lord was terrifying, and he had comprehended the three extreme paths.

"I've seen the Ice and Snow Palace Master!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

The Ice and Snow Palace Lord naturally didn't recognize Ye Tian's identity, she looked at Ye Tian and was full of joy.

"Very good, your qualifications are very good, are you interested in becoming my disciple?"

The Ice Palace Lord asked.

"What?"

Ye Tian was stunned.

The Extreme Dao Deep Sea is still accepting apprentices, how has he heard of it?

Isn't it prevalent to accept junior brothers and subordinates here, one by one Extreme Dao creatures collect a bunch of subordinates, and these Extreme Dao creatures are the subordinates of those big names in the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace.
